name: lookup_order
description: Get order details (status, items, tracking, delivery date, payment last-4) by order ID. Use before any return/refund action.

name: search_orders_by_email
description: List a customer's recent orders when they don't know the order ID. Verify identity first.

name: initiate_return
description: Create an RMA for eligible items (check return window and category eligibility first). Sends prepaid label within 24h.

name: issue_refund
description: Refund to original payment method. Max $100 self-serve; escalate above. Arrives in 5-10 business days.

name: update_account
description: Update email, shipping address, or subscription preferences. Verify identity first. Cannot update payment info (direct customer to account settings).

name: get_product_info
description: Look up product specs, price, stock, warranty, and compatibility from the catalog. Use instead of internal knowledge.

query.description: Product name, SKU, or specific search phrase

name: escalate_to_human
description: Hand off to a human agent per escalation policy. Include order numbers, desired outcome, and steps already taken in the summary.

name: check_giftcard_balance
description: Check gift card balance, expiry, and active status by 16-digit card number (starts with 6039).
